10509050.title: Mary Berry Cooks
10509050.description: Mary shows how to cook dishes to impress guests at a dinner party without getting hot and bothered in the kitchen, including two delicious canapés, a salmon and asparagus starter, a main course of guinea fowl and a decadent chocolate tart.

10513010.title: Mary Berry Cooks

10633350.title: Mary Berry Cooks
10633350.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

10632870.title: Mary Berry Cooks
10632870.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.
